case_title: REV CAPITAL (CALIFORNIA) INC. VS. ESSE TRANSPORT, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2023, NOTICE OF PROVE-UP HEARING FOR REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT GRANTED - PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT.DEPT. 505: JUDGE: MARIA EVANGELISTA; CLERK: K. VALDES; PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 11:34:23 A.M. AND CONCLUDING AT 12:01:37 P.M. (D505)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Amend Judgment To Include Alter Ego Name Of Judgment Debtor And Guarantor'S Actual Legal Name
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Evgeny Skvortsov 609-891-6712 Defendant in Pro Per.
Russian Interpreter Vitaliy Densyov assists Defendant.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED.

The Court did not receive a notice to contest the TR, there is no opposition on file. The Court denies the request for oral argument since the other side is not present. The Court notes Defendant's objections.

Mr. Skvortsov requests to be heard; states he did not let other side know yesterday that he was showing up but he did in the past; he has an Opposition that was sent to the other side by certified mail.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF REV CAPITAL (CALIFORNIA) INC.'s Motion For Order To Amend Judgment To Include Alter Ego Name Of Judgment Debtor And Guarantor'S Actual Legal Name.

The unopposed motion is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For Request For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendants Esse Transport, Inc., Esse Logistics LLC, HBSTODAY Inc., Ekaterina Victorovna Skopich, Evgeny Skvortsov, Luibov Anatoyevna Skvortcova, Turan Way Corp, Roanni, Inc.

Dept. 505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:34:23 a.m. and concluding at 12:01:37 p.m. (D505)

Catherine Robertson, Esq. appeared for and on behalf of Plaintiff Rev Capital (California) Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendants Esse Transport, Inc., Esse Logistics LLC, HBSTODAY Inc., Ekaterina Victorovna Skopich, Evgeny Skvortsov, Luibov Anatoyevna Skvortcova, Turan Way Corp, Roanni, Inc. not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff, Accounts manager Alex Damachin was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's verified complaint for breach of contract filed March 23, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Esse Transport, Inc. filed April 21, 2023
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Esse Logistics LLC filed April 21, 2023
Proof of personal service as to Defendant HBStoday, Inc. filed April 21, 2023
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Ekaterina Victorovna Skopich filed April 21, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Evgeny Skvortsov filed April 21, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Luibov Anatoyevna Skvortcova served May 4, 2023, mailed May 5, 2023; service effectuated May 15, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Turan Way Corp filed April 21, 2023
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Roanni, Inc. filed April 21, 2023.
Default entered on July 7, 2023 as to the following Defendants:
Esse Transport, Inc., Esse Logistics LLC, HBSTODAY Inc., Ekaterina Victorovna Skopich, Evgeny Skvortsov, Luibov Anatoyevna Skvortcova, Turan Way Corp, Roanni, Inc.
Proof of service for notice of default prove up hearing filed October 3, 2023.

Plaintiff's Counsel to summarize the case and provide offer of proof to the Court.
Plaintiff moves Exhibits 1-11 that are attached to the Complaint, Exhibit 12 attached to the Declaration of Catherine Schlomann Robertson and Declaration of Alex Damaschin as evidence.
The Court accepts as evidence.
The Court confirms with the witness who is the Plaintiffs Accounts manager that the amount of the damages in the declarations and statements made by Counsel are true and correct.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Rev Capital (California) Inc. and against Defendants Esse Transport, Inc., Esse Logistics LLC, HBSTODAY Inc., Ekaterina Victorovna Skopich, Evgeny Skvortsov, Luibov Anatoyevna Skvortcova, Turan Way Corp, Roanni, Inc.

Plaintiff to submit and file a dismissal against Doe defendants.

Proposed Judgment to be submitted for review and approval of the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2023 Continued To Dec-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
